center.name: East African montane forests
center.summary: East African montane forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Olive ibis、Abyssinian owl、Cinnamon-chested bee-eater等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Abyssinian owl prefers open grasslands or moorlands with oak or cedar forests, and it is found in mountain valleys and gorges at elevations of up to 2,900 meters (9,514 feet) a.s.l. It lives in the Albertine Rift montane forests, Democratic Republic of Congo, Ethiopia, central Kenya, and Western Uganda. This species is classified as least concern by IUCN due to its very large range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Western High Plateau, the Albertine Rift montane forests and the east African montane forests and isolated lowland areas of Cameroon, the DRC and Angola

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Western High Plateau, the Albertine Rift montane forests and the East African montane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is mainly native to the Albertine Rift montane forests and the East African montane forests of East Africa, in the regions surrounding Lake Victoria

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Albertine Rift montane forests and the East African montane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Mountain Yellow Warbler is native to the Albertine rift and East African montane forests, Imatong and Eastern Arc mountains

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: akleyorum occurs in the montane forests of eastern Africa at altitudes of 1,800-12,000 m above sea level. It is found in the eastern DRCongo, on Mount Kenya and in the Aberdares of Kenya, Kilimanjaro in Tanzania, on Mount Meru and on Mount Elgon; but is apparently absent from lowland forests in east Africa such as the Kakamega tropical rainforest in Kenya.Brooks T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Albertine rift montane forests, the East African montane forests and the southwestern Ethiopian montane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Western High Plateau and Bioko, the Albertine rift montane forests and the East African montane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The golden-winged sunbird is native to the Albertine Rift montane forests and East African montane forests, between altitudes of 1170 and 2300 m
